text:
(a) In this section, “E-verify program” has the meaning assigned by Section 673.001 (Definitions) , Government Code.

(b) The department may not award a contract for the construction, maintenance, or improvement of a highway in this state to a contractor unless the contractor and any subcontractor register with and participate in the E-verify program to verify employee information. The contractor and any subcontractor must continue to participate in the program during the term of the contract.

(c) The department shall develop procedures for the administration and enforcement of this section.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 223. Bids & Contracts for Highway Projects
##### § 223.051 — Verification by Contractors

(a) In this section, “E-verify program” has the meaning assigned by Section 673.001 (Definitions) , Government Code.

(b) The department may not award a contract for the construction, maintenance, or improvement of a highway in this state to a contractor unless the contractor and any subcontractor register with and participate in the E-verify program to verify employee information. The contractor and any subcontractor must continue to participate in the program during the term of the contract.

(c) The department shall develop procedures for the administration and enforcement of this section.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 533 (S.B.312), Sec. 24, eff. September 1, 2017.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department may not award a contract for the construction, maintenance, or improvement of a highway in this state to a contractor unless the contractor and any subcontractor register with and participate in the E-verify program to verify employee information. The contractor and any subcontractor must continue to participate in the program during the term of the contract.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The department shall develop procedures for the administration and enforcement of this section.
